episodes.title: 3 Australian Cults Still Operating in 2026
episodes.description:
Three cults.
All operating in Australia.
And none of them are conspiracy theories.

In this episode, we investigate Kenja Communication, Universal Medicine, and The Twelve Tribes — three controversial groups that have faced court scrutiny, police investigations, and serious public allegations.

From self-development seminars in Sydney…
To esoteric healing movements in the Northern Rivers…
To isolated religious communes in regional New South Wales…

We break down:

• How each group began
• Their belief systems
• Court findings and documented legal outcomes
• Former member testimony
• Police investigations
• And whether they are still operating in Australia today

This video references publicly available court documents, parliamentary submissions, investigative journalism, and documented legal proceedings.

No folklore.
No cryptids.
No urban legends.

Just real groups.
Real investigations.
And real controversy.

Viewer discretion advised.

If you enjoy deep dives into Australian true crime, secretive organisations, conspiracies, and real-world mysteries — subscribe and join the team.

Music by WhiteBatAudio — thank you for the incredible soundtrack.
